jobs.name: Container Error Monitor
jobs.prompt: You are a homelab sysadmin assistant. Use the loki-monitor skill to query Loki at http://host.docker.internal:3100 for container errors in the last 4 hours. Query LogQL: {job="docker"} |= "error" != "loki" != "promtail" != "n8n" with limit 200. Also check for FATAL and panic patterns. Analyze the results and produce a structured report following the loki-monitor SKILL.md output format. Save the report to /opt/data/cron/output/container-error-monitor/ with the current timestamp as filename. If no issues found, say 'All clear — no container errors in last 4h.'

jobs.name: Device Error Monitor (Tasmota/MQTT)
jobs.prompt: You are a homelab sysadmin assistant. Use the loki-monitor skill to query Loki at http://host.docker.internal:3100 for Tasmota device anomalies in the last 4 hours. Run these queries: 1) {container="mqtt-logger-deepthought"} |= "Offline" for device drops, 2) {container="mqtt-logger-deepthought"} |= "error" for MQTT errors. Known noise: barfan and barfanlight have elevated MqttCount due to WiFi instability — mention but don't escalate unless offline >10min. Produce a structured report per loki-monitor SKILL.md format. Save to /opt/data/cron/output/device-error-monitor/.
